DESIGN COMPLIANCE AND INDEMNITY
This design complies with Endeavour Energy's relevant standards as current at this
time and as listed on the Endeavour Energy Accredited Service Provider's
Internet site. These standards include, but are not limited to:
CP:
Connection Policy
EMS: Environmental Management Standard
MIS: Mains Construction Instruction
MD: Mains Design Instruction
PEI: Protection Equipment Installation
PD: Protection Design Instruction
SAD 0001: Design Drawing Standard
MMI: Mains Maintenance Instruction
SDI: Substation Design Instruction
LDI 0001: Public lighting Electrical Design Element
Additionally, where relevant, the design complies with AS/NZS 7000 "Overhead Line
Design - Detailed Procedures" published by The Australian Standards
AECOM AUSTRALIA PTY LTD indemnifies Endeavour Energy
for any loss or damage resulting from non-compliance
of the design with the above standards
